abilities.name: Restless Dead
abilities.description: Mindless Zombies are immune to Slow and gain +4 Pugilism while within a6.

abilities.name: Zombie Apocalypse
abilities.description: Accompanied by and controls number of Mindless Zombies equal to Rank Value.

actions: (1) Drain Life (Necromancy) | AV: 5C (13C) | TN: 12C | Rg: y1 | Resist: Df | Living target suffers 1/3/4 damage, then heals equal to damage inflicted. Crow Fleeting Breath: After killing Living target, reanimates as Mindless Zombie.

(1) Rigor Mortis (Necromancy) | AV: 5C (13C) | TN: 10C | Rg: 10 | Resist: Wp | Living target becomes Slow. Undead becomes Fast. Mask Zombie Food: Friendly Mindless Zombies may take (1) AP Close Combat attack.
(0) Raise Undead | Discard card to animate corpse within 5 yards as Mindless Zombie under control.
system.notes: Practicing necromancer who commands undead minions. Commands zombies equal to Rank Value. Field commanders for undead forces.
